_publications._publicationTitle: Microarray analyses reveal regional astrocyte heterogeneity with implications for neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1)-regulated glial proliferation.

_contextSnippet: It is important to note that there was mutually exclusive expression of NG2 and GFAP in these astroglial cells
details: Mutually exclusive expression of NG2 and GFAP in optic nerve astroglial cells
